case_title: CASTILLO JUANA A. VS GAMARA WANDA G.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY CASTILLO JUANA A. AS TO DEFENDANT GAMARA WANDA G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GAMARA WANDA G.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO JUANA A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAMARA WANDA G. $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $239.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GAMARA WANDA G.
